notes: Aggregated from 12 dft-export batches (1200) + 2 supplementary batches (112) + dft_incremental_200.csv (200). R^2=0.8293 on 80/20 hold-out. AC #1 (R^2>0.90) NOT MET with current 8D Miedema-style feature pipeline on real DFT data. Previous r^2=0.996 was a false positive from the closed-form identity bug closed in 622d362. Escalated to CPO for AC decision.
